topRecommendation.title: Add Mission Swarm summary cards to Night Watch dashboard
topRecommendation.summary: Expose the top recommendation, builder status, and role consensus in one glance.
topRecommendation.reasoning: Highest operator value with minimal UI complexity.

product-strategist.title: Add Mission Swarm summary cards to Night Watch dashboard
product-strategist.summary: Expose the top recommendation, builder status, and role consensus in one glance.
product-strategist.reasoning: Highest operator value with minimal UI complexity.

ux-critic.title: Refine mobile density for Night Watch and Swarm cards
ux-critic.summary: Reduce text wall behavior on mobile and tighten card hierarchy.
ux-critic.reasoning: Useful quality improvement, but less urgent than decision visibility.

engineering-reviewer.title: Add validation reporting for safe builder changes
engineering-reviewer.summary: Display which build or test command was used after a safe builder action.
engineering-reviewer.reasoning: Trust goes up when changes show receipts.

security-reviewer.title: Keep safe builder limited to bounded internal UI/reporting changes
security-reviewer.summary: Do not allow architecture rewrites or sensitive system modifications in automated mode.

operator-prioritizer.title: Show recommendation history and trend of repeated issues
operator-prioritizer.summary: Track whether the same problems keep surfacing night after night.
operator-prioritizer.reasoning: Improves compounding value and prevents recommendation amnesia.
